title: hieracium cordifolium subsp. cerdanum
intro: Hieracium cordifolium subsp. cerdanum, commonly known as Heartleaf Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium cordifolium plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it contains bitter compounds that stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Hieracium cordifolium subsp. cerdanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
